title: Selaginella chrysocaulos
intro: Selaginella chrysocaulos, also known as Golden Rattlesnake Plant, is a species of evergreen, perennial plant in the family Selaginellaceae, characterized by its shiny, dark green fronds. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its use in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms of various conditions. The bioactive constituents of Selaginella chrysocaulos include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.

uses: Selaginella chrysocaulos has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
